templates.name: Website Design & Build
templates.description: End-to-end website design and build. Suggested budget: 120 hours / R120,000. Campaign type: WEBSITE_BUILD.

tasks.name: Discovery workshop & requirements
tasks.description: Kick-off workshop, goals, audience, scope and success metrics

tasks.name: Sitemap & information architecture
tasks.description: Site structure, navigation, content hierarchy

tasks.name: Wireframes & user flows
tasks.description: Low-fi wireframes for key templates + primary user journeys

tasks.name: Visual design system
tasks.description: Design tokens, components, typography, colour system

tasks.name: Page design -- home + key templates
tasks.description: High-fi compositions for home and primary page templates

tasks.name: Frontend development
tasks.description: Build out HTML/CSS/JS against approved designs

tasks.name: CMS integration / content population
tasks.description: Wire pages to CMS, migrate / load launch content

tasks.name: QA & cross-browser testing
tasks.description: Functional, accessibility and cross-browser QA pass

tasks.name: Launch & handover
tasks.description: Go-live, DNS cutover, client training and handover docs

templates.name: Social Media Management Retainer
templates.description: Monthly social media management retainer. Suggested hour bank: 40 hours / month. Campaign type: SOCIAL_MEDIA_RETAINER. Retainer tier: GROWTH.

tasks.name: Monthly content planning & calendar
tasks.description: Plan themes, topics and posting calendar for the month

tasks.name: Content creation -- copy + visuals
tasks.description: Write copy and produce visual assets for scheduled posts

tasks.name: Scheduling & publishing
tasks.description: Schedule posts across channels and publish

tasks.name: Community management & engagement
tasks.description: Respond to comments, DMs and engage the audience

tasks.name: Paid boost management
tasks.description: Boost best-performing posts, manage spend and creative

tasks.name: Monthly performance report
tasks.description: Compile metrics, insights and recommendations for the month

templates.name: Brand Identity
templates.description: Brand strategy and visual identity system. Suggested budget: 80 hours / R110,000. Campaign type: BRAND_IDENTITY.

tasks.name: Brand discovery & strategy workshop
tasks.description: Kick-off workshop to align on brand purpose, audience and positioning

tasks.name: Competitive & market audit
tasks.description: Review competitors, market landscape and category conventions

tasks.name: Brand positioning & voice
tasks.description: Positioning statement, tone of voice and messaging framework

tasks.name: Logo design exploration
tasks.description: Generate multiple logo directions for client review

tasks.name: Logo refinement & finalisation
tasks.description: Refine chosen direction to final production-ready logo

tasks.name: Visual identity system (colour, type, grid)
tasks.description: Colour palette, typography stack and layout grid definition

tasks.name: Brand guidelines document
tasks.description: Compile guidelines covering logo, colour, type, voice and usage

tasks.name: Core asset production (stationery, templates)
tasks.description: Produce launch assets -- business cards, letterheads, deck templates

tasks.name: Brand rollout support
tasks.description: Support client rollout across touchpoints and handover files

templates.name: SEO Campaign
templates.description: Search engine optimisation campaign. Suggested budget: 60 hours / R65,000. Campaign type: SEO_CAMPAIGN.

tasks.name: Technical SEO audit
tasks.description: Crawl site, review indexing, performance and on-site technical issues

tasks.name: Keyword research & mapping
tasks.description: Identify target keywords and map to site pages / content opportunities

tasks.name: On-page optimisation
tasks.description: Apply technical and on-page fixes to target pages

tasks.name: Content brief creation
tasks.description: Produce briefs for new content identified in keyword mapping

tasks.name: Content production
tasks.description: Write and publish SEO-focused content against briefs

tasks.name: Link-building outreach
tasks.description: Outreach to relevant publications / partners for backlinks

tasks.name: Monthly ranking & traffic reporting
tasks.description: Report rankings, organic traffic and next-steps recommendations

templates.name: Content Marketing Retainer
templates.description: Monthly content marketing retainer. Suggested hour bank: 25 hours / month. Campaign type: CONTENT_MARKETING. Retainer tier: STARTER.

tasks.name: Editorial calendar planning
tasks.description: Plan monthly editorial calendar, topics and distribution

tasks.name: Article drafting (2-4 articles)
tasks.description: Draft the month's articles against agreed briefs

tasks.name: Editing & SEO optimisation
tasks.description: Editorial pass plus on-page SEO optimisation for each article

tasks.name: Imagery / hero visuals
tasks.description: Source or produce hero imagery and in-article visuals

tasks.name: Publishing & distribution
tasks.description: Publish to site and distribute across channels / newsletter

tasks.name: Monthly reporting
tasks.description: Report readership, engagement and next-month recommendations
